sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, DATE '2024-01-01', 'New Year'), (2, DATE '2023-12-31', 'New Year Eve'), (3, DATE '2022-02-28', NULL);
CREATE TABLE event_logs (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIME, related_id INTEGER);
INSERT INTO event_logs VALUES (1, TIME '10:00:00', 1), (2, TIME '11:30:00', 1), (3, TIME '15:30:00', NULL);
SELECT d.id, d.event_date, weekday(d.event_date) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_logs WHERE related_id = d.id) AS weekday_difference FROM test_dates d WHERE d.event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT weekday(event_date), COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY weekday(event_date) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT d.id, d.event_date, (TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 00:00:00' - INTERVAL weekday(d.event_date) HOUR) AS adjusted_time FROM test_dates d WHERE d.event_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY adjusted_time;
SELECT e.event_id, e.event_time, e.event_time - INTERVAL (SELECT MAX(weekday(event_date)) FROM test_dates) HOUR AS adjusted_event_time FROM event_logs e WHERE e.related_id IS NOT NULL;

SELECT d.id, d.event_date, weekday(d.event_date) AS wd, (SELECT AVG(event_time) FROM event_logs WHERE related_id = d.id) AS avg_event_time FROM test_dates d JOIN event_logs e ON d.id = e.related_id WHERE avg_event_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id, d.event_date, wd;
SELECT MIN(d.event_date), MAX(d.event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_events AS SELECT d.id, weekday(d.event_date) AS wd FROM test_dates d WHERE d.event_date IS NOT NULL;
